reason: Verified agent communication - sent "Hello! What is 2+2?" to the QA-20260502-190148-c1g8 agent and confirmed it responded with "4" within the timeout period.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - App loaded successfully, sidebar with agent list visible.
Clicked on "QA-20260502-190148-c1g8" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened, showing agent controls and empty chat session.
Verified agent status indicator - Status shows "idle" which meets requirement (running or idle).
Clicked message input field - Input field became active and focused.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message text entered in input field.
Clicked send button - Message submitted successfully, agent status changed to "working", activity indicator appeared showing "Working..." and "0s".
Waited for agent response with 3-minute timeout - Agent completed response within ~2 seconds, status returned to "idle".
Verified response contains "4" - Response clearly displayed in chat as a standalone message "4" with "Worked for 2s" indicator below it.
Took screenshot of final state - Full page screenshot captured showing chat history with both user message and agent response containing "4".
